audienceSections.normal: This chapter teaches [[grammar:S + đang + V]]. Put đang before an action to show that it is in progress now.
audienceSections.expert: This chapter introduces [[grammar:S + đang + V]]: Đang is introduced as an imperfective/progressive marker preceding a dynamic predicate; it does not independently encode tense.

audienceSections.normal:
#### S + đang + V

Put đang before an action to show that it is in progress now. Example: [[grammar:Nguyễn Mai Chi đang ở thư viện.]]
audienceSections.expert:
#### S + đang + V

Đang is introduced as an imperfective/progressive marker preceding a dynamic predicate; it does not independently encode tense. Literal example: [[grammar:Nguyễn Mai Chi đang ở thư viện.]]

audienceSections.normal: Đang highlights an ongoing situation. Vietnamese time reference also depends on context; do not translate đang mechanically as a tense ending.
audienceSections.expert: Đang highlights an ongoing situation. Vietnamese time reference also depends on context; do not translate đang mechanically as a tense ending. The grammar IDs remain distinct and cumulative.

breakdown.normal:
- [[grammar:Nguyễn Mai Chi đang ở thư viện.]] — Nguyễn Mai Chi is at the library now.
- [[grammar:Nguyễn Mai Chi đang tìm sách tham khảo.]] — Nguyễn Mai Chi is looking for a reference book.
- [[grammar:Thủ thư đang ở kệ sách.]] — The librarian is by the bookshelf.
- [[grammar:Nguyễn Mai Chi có thẻ thư viện.]] — Nguyễn Mai Chi has a library card.
- [[grammar:Nguyễn Mai Chi đang mượn sách tham khảo.]] — Nguyễn Mai Chi is borrowing the reference book.
- [[grammar:Trần Thu Hà đang đọc báo.]] — Trần Thu Hà is reading a newspaper.
- [[grammar:Nguyễn Mai Chi trả sách.]] — Nguyễn Mai Chi returns a book.
- [[grammar:Thủ thư kiểm tra thẻ thư viện.]] — The librarian checks the library card.
- [[grammar:Kệ sách rất yên tĩnh.]] — The bookshelf area is very quiet.
- [[grammar:Trần Thu Hà đang tìm tạp chí.]] — Trần Thu Hà is looking for a magazine.

- [[grammar:Nguyễn Mai Chi đang mượn sách tham khảo.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > paragraph 2 > sentence 1.
- [[grammar:Trần Thu Hà đang đọc báo.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > paragraph 2 > sentence 2.
- [[grammar:Nguyễn Mai Chi trả sách.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > paragraph 2 > sentence 3.
- [[grammar:Thủ thư kiểm tra thẻ thư viện.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > paragraph 2 > sentence 4.
